hero.title: Ayyukan samun damar jama'a
hero.lead: Wannan rajista ya lissafa ayyukan jama'a da aka gudanar ta hanyar IATF. An yarda da ayyukan samun dama, kayan aikin yanar gizon, da kuma samfurori da aka adana a bayyane a nan.

intro: An jera ayyukan da aka karɓa a nan da zarar an buga su.

header.title: Juya takamaiman buƙatar samun dama cikin aikin jama'a

paragraphs: IATF tana nazarin takamaiman buƙatun samun damar da za a iya canzawa zuwa aikin buɗe tushen jama'a mai amfani.

emptyState.title: Babu ayyukan da aka buga har yanzu
paragraphs: IATF tana shirya saitin aikinta na farko na jama'a.
Har yanzu kuna iya aika buƙata idan kuna da takamaiman buƙatar samun dama.
